errors.noLocation: This place doesn't have location data

features.title: Explore Bangkok Like Never Before
features.subtitle: Discover authentic experiences, local favorites, and off-the-beaten-path destinations with our AI-powered travel companion.

interactiveMap.title: Interactive Map
interactiveMap.desc: Navigate Bangkok with our interactive map featuring real-time information and personalized recommendations.

tripPlanner.title: Trip Planner
tripPlanner.desc: Get instant answers and personalized travel advice from our intelligent Trip Planner trained on local knowledge.

hiddenGems.title: Hidden Gems
hiddenGems.desc: Discover secret spots, local favorites, and authentic experiences that only locals know about.

places.errorDesc: Check your connection, then try again. If it still does not work, come back in a bit.
places.pageSubtitle: Search by vibe, neighborhood, or category to find places worth the detour.
places.searchPlaceholder: Try riverside cafe, street food, or Talat Noi
places.filtersDescription: Pick one or more categories to narrow your search.
places.noResults: No places match your search yet. Try different keywords.

profile.surveyDesc: Personalize your recommendations with a quick survey.
profile.surveyCompleted: Survey completed. You can update your preferences anytime.
profile.surveyPending: Survey not completed yet. Complete it to get better travel plans.
profile.profileInfoDesc: Your basic information and profile picture
profile.displayNameDesc: This name will be visible to other travelers.
profile.travelStyleDesc: What kind of traveler are you?
profile.travelPrefsDesc: How you like to get around
profile.budgetDesc: Your approximate daily spending in Thai Baht.
profile.languagesDesc: Languages you speak (helps connect with locals and other travelers)

savedTrips.signInPrompt: Please sign in to view your saved trips.
savedTrips.pageSubtitle: Manage your saved trips and revisit your route ideas.
savedTrips.noTrips: No trips found. Create one from the Trip Planner or browse places.
savedTrips.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this trip?
savedTrips.tipDesc: Use search to quickly find trips by stop name and open them from the panel.
